title: fix(fuzz): properly handle errors in executeEvaluate function
body:
## Description

This PR fixes a bug in the executeEvaluate function where errors returned by expressions.Evaluate() were being ignored.

### Changes:
- Properly handle errors from expressions.Evaluate() in executeEvaluate function
- Return empty string when expression evaluation fails
- Removes the TODO comment about handling errors

### Related Issue:
- Fixes potential bug where invalid expressions would silently pass through
head: dev
